body:
## Summary

Adds an experimental hidden `--use-agent-commander` solve option. By default, hive-mind continues to use the existing embedded adapters for `claude`, `codex`, `opencode`, and `agent`. When the flag is explicitly set, solve and restart iterations route tool execution through `agent-commander`.

## What Changed

- Added `src/agent-commander.lib.mjs` as the opt-in adapter around `agent-commander@0.4.3`.
- Added hidden `--use-agent-commander` to `SOLVE_OPTION_DEFINITIONS`; `hive` forwards it through the existing solve passthrough option map.
- Wired the flag into initial solve execution, tool connection validation, uncommitted-change handling, and watch/auto-restart tool iterations.
- Preserved the default embedded execution path when the flag is absent.
- Updated `agent-commander` from `^0.4.2` to `^0.4.3` for prompt-file support needed by large hive-mind prompts.
- Added a default-suite regression test covering option defaults, hive passthrough, controller option mapping, validation dry-run behavior, execution/result normalization, and cost/session summary extraction.
- Added `docs/case-studies/issue-1043/` with collected issue/PR/package evidence, requirements, compatibility notes, and upstream gap tracking.

## Upstream Follow-Up

Opened focused issues for missing full-parity surfaces in `agent-commander`:

- https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander/issues/29
- https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander/issues/30

## Verification

- `npx eslint src/agent-commander.lib.mjs src/solve.mjs src/solve.restart-shared.lib.mjs src/solve.validation.lib.mjs src/solve.config.lib.mjs tests/test-agent-commander-option.mjs`
- `npm run lint`
- `node tests/test-agent-commander-option.mjs`
- `node tests/test-hive-solve-option-parity.mjs`
- `node tests/test-issue-1718-hive-passthrough-false.mjs`
- `npm test` (all 80 selected test files passed)
- `bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` (passed; existing near-limit warnings only)



Fixes #1043

commits.messageBody:
Adding CLAUDE.md with task information for AI processing.
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1043

This commit adds the `--use-agent-commander` option to both solve.mjs
and hive.mjs. When enabled, this experimental flag delegates tool
execution to the agent-commander library instead of using embedded
logic.

Changes:
- Add --use-agent-commander option to solve.config.lib.mjs (hidden)
- Add --use-agent-commander option to hive.config.lib.mjs (hidden)
- Create agent-commander.lib.mjs wrapper library
- Integrate agent-commander in solve.mjs tool execution flow
- Pass --use-agent-commander flag through hive.mjs to solve workers
- Add agent-commander as optional dependency in package.json
- Add experiment scripts for testing the integration

The option is:
- Hidden from --help (experimental)
- Disabled by default
- Fails gracefully when agent-commander is not installed

Fixes #1043
